case_title: LANDRY, DAVID J. VS SOUTH BEACH MARINA APARTMENTS, LTD.

docket_entries.description: LETTER FROM PLAINTIFF OPPOSING CONTINUANCE REQUEST RECEIVED AND SENT TO DEPT. 6.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-12-1994, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO AUG-23-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LANDRY, DAVID J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUTH BEACH MARINA APARTMENTS, LTD. $514.27 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $534.27 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,364.27 FILED BY LANDRY, DAVID J. AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTH BEACH MARINA APARTMENTS, LTD. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTH BEACH MARINA APARTMENTS, LTD.
CERTIFIED MAIL TO MAYNARD RICH MANAGEMENT RETUR- NED SIGNED.
